data_sources: PRISM Climate Data, United States Census Bureau
what_s_in_the_dataset_: Daily tract-level temperature and precipitation data from 1981–2024, along with annual percentiles and extreme weather indicators to support research on environmental trends and health impacts.
Locations of toxic chemical release, processing, use, and manufacture as self-reported by industries subject to EPA mandate
Days with certain types of weather by county (i.e. hot, freezing, snowy, etc)
